prompt: Kurama the nine-tailed orange fox demon from Naruto. CRITICAL ORIENTATION: the fox sits facing south, meaning the head + face + front legs are at the highest +Z coordinates of the build (positive z = south = toward viewer). The nine long tails fan out in the OPPOSITE direction, behind the fox at the most negative -Z coordinates (north). The fox is taller at the front (face/head) than the back (tails). Build the head, ears, eyes, snout, and front paws at the +Z end. Build the body and the nine tails extending into the -Z direction. Recognizable Kurama silhouette viewed from the south
